Off Calendar Jun-01-2009 Continued To Sep-14-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Julia Lingys for May Woo (Petitioner). Edward Koplowitz for Edward Lau (Respondent).

Ms. Lingys stated that they had received the accounting but wanted to focus on bigger issues such as gifting, etc. Mr. Koplowitz stated that they had filed the accounting minus the cover page and that he had spoken with Ms. Lingys regarding the issues. The parties agreed to mediation. The Court referred the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than August 31, 2009. The matter is continued to September 14, 2009 for status on the mediation. The trial date is to be set.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Shannon.

Application For Determination That Proposed Petn. To Redress Breaches Of Trust
Off Calendar Nov-20-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Koplowitz for Edwin Lau (Trustee). Edward Thirkell for the Beneficiary.

The Parties presented oral argument to support their postitions with respect to the accounting. The matter was taken under submisssion.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Guitron.

Application For Determination That Proposed Petn. To Redress Breaches Of Trust
Off Calendar Nov-05-2008 Continued To Nov-19-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Koplowitz for Edwin Lau. Ed Thirkell for May Woo.

Mr. Thirkell stated that no opposition had been filed. Mr. Koplowitz requested a continuance stating that an accounting had been provided to Ms. Lingys, that he had not been told of any opposition and that he was not prepared to deal with any of the merits. Mr. Thirkell stated that there were some issues with the accounting, that the remaining issues would not trigger the no contest clause and requested the petition be granted. The matter was continued to November 19, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Weatherly.

Application For Determination That Proposed Petn. To Redress Breaches Of Trust
Off Calendar Oct-21-2008 Continued To Nov-05-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Julia Lingys for May Woo. Edward Koplowitz for Edwin Lau.

The Parties stipulated to having the matter continued. Mr. Koplowitz stated that he provided a preliminary acounting to opposing Counsel and that she needed time to review it. The matter was continued to November 5, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy B. Mann.
